name: Argenti (Honkai Star Rail)
description:
The Local Knight Of Beauty has been debating on what bread to buy for 10 minutes.


This guy is such a goober. AN ANGSTY GOOBER, but he gets to be a little silly, as a treat. I've been meaning to make this for a while but have been delaying it. My apologies! If there's any issues, suggestions, or requests you have, please let me know!
creator: DeAuresAlchimia
